{"pre_click_js": "const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')); const lastMonthButton = buttons.filter(b => b.textContent.trim().match(/^(January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December) \\d{4}$/)).pop(); if (lastMonthButton) lastMonthButton.click();", "field_map": {"portfolio": "DLG Set", "amount": "Cohort values under each DLG set (₹ Crores)", "as_on": {"constant": "2025-12-31"}}}

{"pre_click_js": "const clickMatch = (selectors, predicate) => { for (const sel of selectors) { const el = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)).find(predicate); if (el) { el.click(); return true; } } return false; }; clickMatch(['button','a','div'], el => el.textContent && el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'credit'); setTimeout(() => { clickMatch(['button','a','div'], el => el.textContent && el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().includes('dlg disclosure')); }, 500);", "field_map": {"portfolio": "Portfolio", "amount": "Amount (In ₹ Cr)*", "as_on": {"constant": "2025-12-31"}}}
